Atlas_Scientific_EZO.description: Standard calibration procedure for Atlas Scientific EZO circuits (pH, EC, DO, ORP).

procedure.name: Temperature Compensation
procedure.description: Set the solution temperature for accurate calibration (optional but recommended).

procedure.name: Mid-Point Calibration
procedure.description: Always calibrate the mid-point first (e.g., pH 7.00).

module_function.description: Use the DaemonControl.module_function() to trigger calibration buttons programmatically.
